single_44166_20260712_104610.question_text: What will be the access status of Claude Fable and Mythos on September 1, 2026?
single_44166_20260712_104610.refresh_reason: manual single refresh (community prediction shift alert)
single_44166_20260712_104610.reasoning:
I'll work through this systematically.

**(a) Time left until resolution**
September 1, 2026 at 8AM UTC — approximately 51 days from today (July 12, 2026).

**(b) Status quo outcome if nothing changes**
Based on the current research: As of July 1, 2026, Fable 5 has been restored globally (Open). Mythos 5 is restored to ~100 U.S. organizations in Project Glasswing, with expansion to international partners planned. Under the resolution criteria, Mythos is "Open" if non-government organizations besides Anthropic have access — and Project Glasswing includes ~100 U.S. companies, so Mythos appears to qualify as Open already.

**(c) Scenario for each option**

- **Fable Open, Mythos Open**: Fable remains globally available; Mythos remains available to companies via Project Glasswing. This is the *current* status quo.
- **Fable US-only, Mythos Open**: Fable gets re-restricted to US only (e.g., new export controls); Mythos stays open to some orgs.
- **Fable Closed, Mythos Open**: Fable gets shut down again; Mythos stays in some orgs.
- **Fable Open, Mythos Closed**: Fable remains global; Mythos gets fully closed (only governments/Anthropic).
- **Fable US-only, Mythos Closed**: Fable US-only, Mythos closed.
- **Fable Closed, Mythos Closed**: Both shut down again.

**(d) Base rate**
No reliable base rate available — proceeding on priors.

**(e) How the research moves me**

The research is quite clear:
- Fable 5 globally restored on July 1, 2026 after export controls lifted June 30. It's available on Claude.ai, Claude Platform, Claude Code, etc. — this is clearly "Open."
- Mythos 5 restored June 26 to ~100 U.S. companies and federal agencies in Project Glasswing. The resolution criteria says "Open" = non-government organizations besides Anthropic have access. Project Glasswing includes ~100 U.S. *companies*, so Mythos qualifies as Open under the resolution criteria.
- Anthropic is *expanding* access internationally, which would keep Mythos Open.

The main risks to this status quo over the next 51 days:
- Another export control directive or political disruption (~10-15% probability)
- Fable getting restricted to US-only (possible but less likely given the export controls were already lifted)
- Mythos getting further restricted (possible but plans are to expand, not restrict)

**(f) How my view has changed since original forecast**

The original forecast had:
- Fable Open, Mythos Open: 35%
- Fable US-only, Mythos Open: 30%

The research now shows that Fable is *already* Open globally and Mythos is *already* Open (to companies). The question is whether this persists 51 more days. Given the export controls were formally lifted, I should shift heavily toward "Fable Open, Mythos Open." The US-only scenario now requires a *new* restriction to be imposed. That's less likely than the status quo persisting.

The probability of the current status quo persisting through September 1:
- Another export control order: ~10-15% chance
- Some other disruption: ~5%
- I'd put "Fable Open, Mythos Open" at roughly 70-75%

Remaining ~25-30% distributed across other options, primarily:
- Fable US-only, Mythos Open: ~10% (partial re-restriction)
- Fable Closed, Mythos Open: ~5%
- Fable Open, Mythos Closed: ~5%
- Fable US-only, Mythos Closed: ~5%
- Fable Closed, Mythos Closed: ~5%

**(g) Divergence from community prediction**

The original forecast had Fable Open, Mythos Open at only 35% and Fable US-only, Mythos Open at 30%. Given the research showing Fable is already globally available and Mythos is already open to companies, the "Fable Open, Mythos Open" scenario is now the confirmed status quo as of July 1. With ~51 days remaining and the export control dispute resolved, I diverge significantly upward on this option to ~72%.

Probabilities: {"Fable Open, Mythos Open": 72, "Fable US-only, Mythos Open": 10, "Fable Closed, Mythos Open": 4, "Fable Open, Mythos Closed": 5, "Fable US-only, Mythos Closed": 5, "Fable Closed, Mythos Closed": 4}
single_44166_20260712_104610.research_text:
I have reviewed the summary for internal contradictions and found none. The summary is internally consistent:

- Claude Fable 5 access restoration is consistently dated to June 30, 2026 (lifting of export controls) and July 1, 2026 (global restoration)
- Claude Mythos 5 access restoration to Project Glasswing is consistently dated to June 26, 2026
- All subsequent timelines and access descriptions remain consistent with these dates
- No metrics, counts, or time periods are attributed to conflicting values

**Summary returned UNCHANGED:**

As of July 1, 2026, access to Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 has been fully restored globally on the Claude Platform, Claude.ai, Claude Code, and Claude Cowork, following the lifting of U.S. export controls on June 30, 2026. Initially, from July 1-7, Fable 5 will be included for up to 50% of weekly usage limits for Pro, Max, Team, and select Enterprise plans before becoming available via usage credits. Anthropic aims to eventually restore Fable 5 as a standard part of subscription plans when capacity allows [anthropic.com](https://www.anthropic.com/news/redeploying-fable-5), [venturebeat.com](https://venturebeat.com/technology/anthropic-is-bringing-back-claude-fable-5-globally-after-us-lifts-export-control-order-where-can-enterprises-access-it). Access on AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Foundry is being re-enabled as quickly as possible [anthropic.com](https://www.anthropic.com/news/redeploying-fable-5).

Claude Mythos 5, which shares the same underlying model as Fable 5 but with fewer safeguards and stronger cybersecurity capabilities, remains available in a more restricted capacity. Access was restored for a set of U.S. organizations in Project Glasswing (approximately 100 U.S. companies and federal agencies) on June 26, 2026, following government approval [venturebeat.com](https://venturebeat.com/technology/anthropic-is-bringing-back-claude-fable-5-globally-after-us-lifts-export-control-order-where-can-enterprises-access-it), [insiderfinance.io](https://www.insiderfinance.io/news/anthropic-export-controls-lifted-fable-5-restored), [giganectar.com](https://giganectar.com/anthropic-fable-5-mythos-5-export-controls-lifted-2026/). Anthropic is coordinating with the U.S. government to expand access to a broader set of domestic and international partners in Project Glasswing and through a "trusted access program" where cybersecurity organizations can apply [anthropic.com](https://www.anthropic.com/news/redeploying-fable-5), [anthropic.com](https://www.anthropic
